targets.expr:
topk(200,
  sum by (region, network, vendor, finality, category) (
    increase(erpc_network_successful_request_total{
      cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
      region=~"${region:regex}",
      user=~"${user:regex}",
      network=~"${network:regex}",
      network!~"${ignore_network:regex}",
      project=~"${project:regex}",
      vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
      vendor!~"${ignore_vendor:regex}",
      category=~"${category:regex}",
      finality=~"${finality:regex}"
    }[$__range])
  )
)

topk(20,
  sum by (vendor) (
    increase(erpc_network_successful_request_total{
      cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
      region=~"${region:regex}",
      network=~"${network:regex}",
      network!~"${ignore_network:regex}",
      project=~"${project:regex}",
      vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
      vendor!~"${ignore_vendor:regex}",
      category=~"${category:regex}",
      finality=~"${finality:regex}",
      user=~"${user:regex}"
    }[$__range])
  )
)

topk(20,
  sum by (upstream) (
    increase(erpc_upstream_request_total{
      cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
      region=~"${region:regex}",
      network=~"${network:regex}",
      network!~"${ignore_network:regex}",
      project=~"${project:regex}",
      vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
      vendor!~"${ignore_vendor:regex}",
      category=~"${category:regex}",
      finality=~"${finality:regex}",
      user=~"${user:regex}"
    }[$__range])
  )
)

topk(20,
  sum by (region, network) (
    increase(erpc_network_successful_request_total{
      cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
      region=~"${region:regex}",
      network=~"${network:regex}",
      network!~"${ignore_network:regex}",
      project=~"${project:regex}",
      vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
      vendor!~"${ignore_vendor:regex}",
      category=~"${category:regex}",
      finality=~"${finality:regex}",
      user=~"${user:regex}"
    }[$__range])
  )
)

topk(20,
  sum by (category) (
    increase(erpc_network_successful_request_total{
      cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
      region=~"${region:regex}",
      network=~"${network:regex}",
      network!~"${ignore_network:regex}",
      project=~"${project:regex}",
      vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
      vendor!~"${ignore_vendor:regex}",
      category=~"${category:regex}",
      finality=~"${finality:regex}",
      user=~"${user:regex}"
    }[$__range])
  )
)

topk(20,
  sum by (finality, vendor) (
    increase(erpc_network_successful_request_total{
      cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
      region=~"${region:regex}",
      network=~"${network:regex}",
      network!~"${ignore_network:regex}",
      project=~"${project:regex}",
      vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
      vendor!~"${ignore_vendor:regex}",
      category=~"${category:regex}",
      finality=~"${finality:regex}",
      user=~"${user:regex}"
    }[$__range])
  )
)

panels.description: Total successful responses sent back to the client

targets.expr:
sum(increase(erpc_network_successful_request_total{
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    vendor!~"${ignore_vendor:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}",user=~"${user:regex}"
    }[1m])) by (region, agent_name, user) > 0

panels.title: Total Responses (by Region and User-Agent)

panels.description: Total successful responses sent back to the client

targets.expr:
sum(increase(erpc_network_successful_request_total{
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    vendor!~"${ignore_vendor:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}",user=~"${user:regex}"
    }[1m])) by (region) > 0

panels.title: Total Responses (by Region)

panels.description: Total requests received by eRPC for a specific network and method

targets.expr:
sum(increase(erpc_network_request_received_total{
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    network!~"${ignore_network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regexp}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}"
}[1m])) by (region, network, category, finality)

panels.title: Incoming Requests

panels.description: Total requests received by eRPC for a specific network and method

targets.expr:
sum(rate(erpc_network_request_received_total{
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    network!~"${ignore_network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}"
}[$__rate_interval])) by (region, network, user, category, finality) > 0

panels.title: Incoming RPS

panels.description: Total successful responses sent back to the client

targets.expr:
sum(rate(erpc_network_successful_request_total{
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    vendor!~"${ignore_vendor:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}"
}[1m])) by (region, network, vendor, category, finality, emptyish) > 0

panels.title: Successful Responses RPS

panels.description: When a request fails even after trying all upstreams and retries, we send a error response to the user. This chart shows critical errors that need attention and wake-up alarms.

targets.expr:
sum(increase(erpc_network_failed_request_total{
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    severity="critical",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}"
}[1m])) by (network,category, finality,error) > 0

panels.title: Network-level Critical Errors

panels.description: Issues where clients got an error but it's most probably due to bad requests or a transient problem with upstreams

targets.expr:
sum(increase(erpc_network_failed_request_total{
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    severity="warning",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}"
}[1m])) by (network,category,error,region, user) > 0

panels.title: Network-level Warnings

panels.description: Client-side errors where it's most probably a normal operation (eth_call reverts) or bad request by the user

targets.expr:
sum(increase(erpc_network_failed_request_total{
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    severity="info",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}"
}[1m])) by (network,category,error,user) > 0

panels.title: Network-level Notices

targets.expr:
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(erpc_network_request_duration_seconds_bucket{
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    vendor!="<error>",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}"
}[1m])) by (le, network, category, finality))

histogram_quantile(0.9, sum(rate(erpc_network_request_duration_seconds_bucket{
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    vendor!="<error>",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}"
}[1m])) by (le, network, category, finality))

histogram_quantile(0.5, sum(rate(erpc_network_request_duration_seconds_bucket{
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    vendor!="<error>",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}"
}[1m])) by (le, network, category, finality))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(erpc_network_request_duration_seconds_bucket{
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    vendor="<error>",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}"
}[1m])) by (le, network, category, finality, vendor))

histogram_quantile(0.9, sum(rate(erpc_network_request_duration_seconds_bucket{
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    vendor="<error>",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}"
}[1m])) by (le, network, category, finality, vendor))

histogram_quantile(0.5, sum(rate(erpc_network_request_duration_seconds_bucket{
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    vendor="<error>",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}"
}[1m])) by (le, network, category, finality, vendor))

panels.description: Current calculated quantile threshold used to trigger hedged requests. This depends on the hedge.quantile and actual latencies (e.g. p70)

targets.expr: avg(erpc_network_hedge_delay_seconds{network=~"${network:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",finality=~"${finality:regex}"}) by (project, network, category, finality)

panels.title: Hedge Quantile

panels.description: Total hedge requests fired due to initial upstream being slow

targets.expr: sum(rate(erpc_network_hedged_request_total{network=~"${network:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",finality=~"${finality:regex}"}[1m])) by (project, network, category, finality)

panels.title: Hedge RPS

panels.description: Total hedged requests that ended up being actually faster and useful. The higher the better. If this value is too low try increasing the failsafe.hedge.quantile to higher value e.g. 0.99

targets.expr: 1 - ((sum(increase(erpc_network_hedge_discards_total{attempt!="1",network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",finality=~"${finality:regex}"}[30s])) by (project, network)) / (sum(increase(erpc_network_hedged_request_total{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",finality=~"${finality:regex}"}[1m])) by (project, network))) > 0

panels.title: Hedge Effectiveness

panels.description: When identical requests arrive at the same time they'll be merged, this number shows number of these requests

targets.expr: sum(rate(erpc_network_multiplexed_request_total{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",finality=~"${finality:regex}"}[1m])) by (project, network, category, finality)

panels.title: Multiplexed RPS

panels.description: Shows the finality state of the block related to the response, this shows if your workload is mainly around head of chain unfinalized data, or historical finalized data.

targets.expr: sum(increase(erpc_network_successful_request_total{network=~"${network:regex}",vendor=~"${vendor:regexp}",upstream=~"${upstream:regexp}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",finality=~"${finality:regex}"}[1m])) by (finality)

panels.title: Response Finality Share Overall

panels.description: Shows the finality state of the block related to the response, this shows if your workload is mainly around head of chain unfinalized data, or historical finalized data.

targets.expr: sum(increase(erpc_network_successful_request_total{network=~"${network:regex}",vendor=~"${vendor:regexp}",upstream=~"${upstream:regexp}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",finality=~"${finality:regex}"}[1m])) by (vendor, finality)

panels.title: Response Finality Share By Vendor

panels.description: Highest value for latest block polled from all upstreams across all replicas

targets.expr: max(erpc_upstream_finalized_block_number{upstream="*",network!="",network=~"${network:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}) by (project, network)

panels.title: Highest Finalized Block

panels.description: Highest value for latest block polled from all upstreams across all replicas

targets.expr: max(erpc_upstream_latest_block_number{upstream="*",network!="",network=~"${network:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}) by (project, network)

panels.title: Highest Latest Block

panels.description: Comparison of block timestamp distance between EVM State Poller and Network Responses to identify cache staleness and synchronization issues

targets.expr: avg(erpc_network_latest_block_timestamp_distance_seconds{network!="",network=~"${network:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",origin="evm_state_poller"}) by (network)

panels.title: Block Timestamp Distance - EVM State Poller

panels.description: Comparison of block timestamp distance between EVM State Poller and Network Responses to identify cache staleness and synchronization issues

targets.expr: avg(erpc_network_latest_block_timestamp_distance_seconds{network!="",network=~"${network:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",origin="network_response"}) by (network)

panels.title: Block Timestamp Distance - Network Response

panels.description: Dynamically computed block time per network in seconds. Used to auto-tune the state poller interval and debounce.

targets.expr: erpc_network_dynamic_block_time_milliseconds{network!="",network=~"${network:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}

panels.title: Dynamic Block Time

targets.expr:
sum by (vendor, finality) (
  erpc_network_successful_request_total{
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    vendor!="n/a",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}"
  }
)

panels.description: These are real requests sent to upstream endpoints, including retries, grouped by Vendor Name

targets.expr:
sum(increase(erpc_upstream_request_total{
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    composite="none",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}"
}[1m])) by (network, vendor, category)

panels.title: Vendor Requests

panels.description: These are real requests sent to upstream endpoints, including retries

targets.expr:
sum(rate(erpc_upstream_request_total{
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    composite="none",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}"
}[1m])) by (vendor, category)

panels.title: Vendor RPS

panels.description: Failures received when attempting upstream endpoints, these errors mean upstream has failures

targets.expr:
sum(increase(erpc_upstream_request_errors_total{
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    severity="critical",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    composite="none",
    user=~"${user:regex}",
    project=~"${project:regex}"
}[1m])) by (region, project, upstream, category, error) > 0

panels.title: Upstream-level critical errors

panels.description: Failures received when attempting upstream endpoints, these errors mean upstream has failures

targets.expr:
sum(increase(erpc_upstream_request_errors_total{
    severity="warning",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    composite="none",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}"
}[1m])) by (project, network, vendor, category, finality, error) > 0

panels.title: Vendor warnings

targets.expr:
histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(erpc_upstream_request_duration_seconds_bucket{
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    composite="none",
    project=~"${project:regex}"
}[1m])) by (le, project, vendor, category))

histogram_quantile(0.9, sum(rate(erpc_upstream_request_duration_seconds_bucket{
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    composite="none",
    project=~"${project:regex}"
}[1m])) by (le, project, vendor, category))

histogram_quantile(0.50, sum(rate(erpc_upstream_request_duration_seconds_bucket{network=~"${network:regex}",vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",composite="none",project=~"${project:regex}"}[30s])) by (le, project, vendor, category))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(erpc_upstream_request_duration_seconds_bucket{
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    composite="none",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}"
}[1m])) by (le, project, upstream, category, finality))

histogram_quantile(0.9, sum(rate(erpc_upstream_request_duration_seconds_bucket{
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    composite="none",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}"
}[1m])) by (le, project, upstream, category, finality))

histogram_quantile(0.50, sum(rate(erpc_upstream_request_duration_seconds_bucket{
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    composite="none",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}"
}[30s])) by (le, project, upstream, category, finality))

panels.description: These are real requests sent to upstream endpoints, including retries

targets.expr:
sum(increase(erpc_upstream_request_total{
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}",
    composite="none",
    project=~"${project:regex}"
}[1m])) by (project, network, upstream, category, attempt)

panels.title: Upstream-level Requests

panels.description: These are real requests sent to upstream endpoints, including retries

targets.expr:
sum(rate(erpc_upstream_request_total{
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}",
    composite="none",
    project=~"${project:regex}"
}[1m])) by (project, network, upstream, category, finality)

panels.title: Upstream-level RPS

panels.description: Failures received when attempting upstream endpoints, these errors mean upstream has failures

targets.expr:
sum(increase(erpc_upstream_request_errors_total{
    severity="critical",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}",
    composite="none",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    project=~"${project:regex}"
}[1m])) by (project, network, upstream, category, error) > 0

panels.title: Upstream-level critical errors

panels.description: Failures received when attempting upstream endpoints, these errors mean upstream has failures

targets.expr:
sum(increase(erpc_upstream_request_errors_total{
    severity="warning",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    composite="none",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}",
    project=~"${project:regex}"
}[1m])) by (project, network, upstream, category, error) > 0

panels.title: Upstream-level warnings

targets.expr:
sum(increase(erpc_upstream_wrong_empty_response_total{
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}",
    project=~"${project:regex}"
}[1m])) by (project, network, upstream, category) > 0

panels.description: Failures received when attempting upstream endpoints, these errors mean upstream has failures

targets.expr:
sum(increase(erpc_upstream_request_errors_total{
    severity="info",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    user=~"${user:regex}",
    composite="none",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    vendor!~"${ignore_vendor:regex}",
    project=~"${project:regex}"
}[1m])) by (project, network, upstream, category, error) > 0

panels.title: Upstream-level notices

panels.description: Total number of times a request was skipped due to upstream latest block being less than requested upper bound block

targets.expr:
sum(increase(erpc_upstream_stale_upper_bound_total{
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    project=~"${project:regex}"
}[1m])) by (project, network, vendor, upstream, category)

panels.title: Upstream stale upper-bound

panels.description: Total number of times a request was skipped due to requested lower bound block being less than upstream's available block range.

targets.expr:
sum(increase(erpc_upstream_stale_lower_bound_total{
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",
    project=~"${project:regex}"
}[1m])) by (project, network, vendor, upstream, category)

panels.title: Upstream stale lower-bound

targets.expr:
avg(erpc_upstream_score_overall{
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    upstream!="n/a",
}) by (region, project, upstream, category)
avg(erpc_upstream_block_head_lag{upstream!="*",network!="",network=~"${network:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",vendor=~"${vendor:regex}"}) by (project, network, upstream) <= 5000

panels.description: A special lagging tracker showing only lags of above 5000 blocks which indicates node too far off.

targets.expr: avg(erpc_upstream_block_head_lag{upstream!="*",network!="",network=~"${network:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",vendor=~"${vendor:regex}"}) by (project, upstream, network,category) > 5000

panels.title: Out-of-sync latest block lag by Upstream

targets.expr: avg(erpc_upstream_latest_block_number{upstream!="*",network!="",network=~"${network:regex}",vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}) by (project, region, upstream, network)

panels.description: How many times we had to Poll for latest block number. This number can go up by integrity module if debounce config is too low.

targets.expr: sum(increase(erpc_upstream_latest_block_polled_total{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}[1m])) by (project, network, upstream)

panels.title: Latest Block Polls

panels.description: Difference between lowest and highest finalized block as reported by upstreams. Min/Max/Mean are values across multiple replicas (if you have erpc in a multi-container setup)

targets.expr: avg(erpc_upstream_finalization_lag{upstream!="*",network!="",network=~"${network:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",vendor=~"${vendor:regex}"}) by (project, upstream, network) <= 5000

panels.title: Finalized Block Lag by Upstream

panels.description: A special lagging tracker showing only lags of above 5000 blocks which indicates node too far off.

targets.expr: avg(erpc_upstream_finalization_lag{upstream!="*",network!="",network=~"${network:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",vendor=~"${vendor:regex}"}) by (project, upstream, network) > 5000

panels.title: Out-of-sync Finalized Blocks by Upstream

targets.expr: avg(erpc_upstream_finalized_block_number{upstream!="*",network!="",network=~"${network:regex}",vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}) by (project, upstream, network)

panels.description: How many times we had to Poll for finalized block number.

targets.expr: sum(increase(erpc_upstream_finalized_block_polled_total{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}[1m])) by (project, network, upstream)

panels.title: Finalized Block Polls

panels.description: How many times upstream returned a stale latest block (compared to other nodes) for eth_getBlockByNumber(latest) and eth_blockNumber

targets.expr: sum(increase(erpc_upstream_stale_latest_block_total{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",vendor=~"${vendor:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}[1m])) by (project, network, upstream, category)

panels.title: Stale latest block by Upstream

panels.description: How many times upstream returned stale finalized block (compared to other nodes) for eth_getBlockByNumber(finalized) and eth_blockNumber

targets.expr: sum(increase(erpc_upstream_stale_finalized_block_total{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}[1m])) by (project, network, upstream, category)

panels.title: Stale finalized block by Upstream

panels.description: These are issues that are most often edge-cases that are not covered within eRPC logic, and must be reported to the team.

targets.expr: sum(increase(erpc_unexpected_panic_total{project=~"${project:regex}"}[1m])) by (scope, extra, error)

panels.title: Unexpected panics

targets.expr: sum(increase(erpc_shadow_response_identical_total{project=~"${project:regexp}",network=~"${network:regexp}"}[1m])) by (project, network, upstream, category, finality)
sum(increase(erpc_shadow_response_mismatch_total{project=~"${project:regexp}",network=~"${network:regexp}"}[1m])) by (project, network, upstream, category, emptyish, larger)
sum(increase(erpc_shadow_response_error_total{project=~"${project:regexp}",network=~"${network:regexp}"}[1m])) by (project, network, upstream, category, finality, error)

sum(increase(erpc_cache_set_success_total{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}[1m])) by (project, network, category, connector)

histogram_quantile(0.5, sum(rate(erpc_cache_set_success_duration_seconds_bucket{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}[1m])) by (le, project, network, category, connector))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(erpc_cache_set_success_duration_seconds_bucket{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}[1m])) by (le, project, network, category, connector, policy, ttl))

sum(increase(erpc_cache_set_error_total{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}[1m])) by (project, network, category, connector, policy, error, ttl)

histogram_quantile(0.5, sum(rate(erpc_cache_set_error_duration_seconds_bucket{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}[1m])) by (le, project, network, category, connector, policy, ttl))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(erpc_cache_set_error_duration_seconds_bucket{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}[1m])) by (le, project, network, category, connector, policy, ttl))

sum(increase(erpc_cache_get_success_hit_total{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}[30s])) by (project, network, category, connector)

histogram_quantile(0.5, sum(rate(erpc_cache_get_success_hit_duration_seconds_bucket{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}[30s])) by (le, project, network, category, connector))

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(erpc_cache_get_success_hit_duration_seconds_bucket{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}[30s])) by (le, project, network, category, connector))

sum(increase(erpc_cache_get_success_miss_total{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}[1m])) by (project, network, category, connector)

histogram_quantile(0.5, sum(rate(erpc_cache_get_success_miss_duration_seconds_bucket{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}[30s])) by (le, project, network, category, connector))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(erpc_cache_get_success_miss_duration_seconds_bucket{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}"}[30s])) by (le, project, network, category, connector))

sum(increase(erpc_cache_get_error_total{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",error!~".*(ErrRecordNotFound|MissingData).*",project=~"${project:regex}"}[1m])) by (region, project, network, category, connector, error)

histogram_quantile(0.5, sum(rate(erpc_cache_get_error_duration_seconds_bucket{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",error!~".*(ErrRecordNotFound|MissingData).*",project=~"${project:regex}"}[30s])) by (le, project, network, category, connector, error))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum(rate(erpc_cache_get_error_duration_seconds_bucket{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",error!~"ErrRecordNotFound.*",project=~"${project:regex}"}[30s])) by (le, project, network, category, connector, error))
sum(increase(erpc_consensus_total{cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",network=~"${network:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}"}[1m])) by (network, category)

histogram_quantile(1, sum(rate(erpc_consensus_agreement_count_bucket{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",finality=~"${finality:regex}"}[1m])) by (le, network, category, finality))

sum(increase(erpc_consensus_responses_collected_count{cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",network=~"${network:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",finality=~"${finality:regex}"}[1m])) by (network, category, finality, vendors) > 0

histogram_quantile(1, sum(rate(erpc_consensus_responses_collected_bucket{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",finality=~"${finality:regex}"}[1m])) by (le, network, category, short_circuited, finality))

sum(increase(erpc_consensus_misbehavior_detected_total{
    region=~"${region:regex}",
    cluster=~"${cluster:regex}",
    project=~"${project:regex}",
    network=~"${network:regex}",
    upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",
    category=~"${category:regex}",
    finality=~"${finality:regex}"
}[1m])) by (network, upstream, category, finality, response_type, larger_than_consensus) > 0
sum(increase(erpc_consensus_short_circuit_total{network=~"${network:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}"}[1m])) by (network, category, reason, finality) > 0
sum(increase(erpc_consensus_errors_total{network=~"${network:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}"}[1m])) by (network, category, category, error, finality) > 0
sum(increase(erpc_consensus_cancellations_total{network=~"${network:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}"}[1m])) by (network, category, phase, finality) > 0

panels.description: Dynamically tuned value for maxCount of different rate limit budgets. NOTE This value is SUM of all replicas (in a multiple container setup)

targets.expr: avg by (budget, method) (erpc_rate_limiter_budget_max_count{})

panels.title: Rate-limit budget MaxCount

targets.expr: sum(rate(erpc_rate_limits_total{origin="project",project=~"${project:regex}",network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}"}[1m])) by (project, network, budget)

sum(rate(erpc_rate_limits_total{origin="network",project=~"${project:regex}",network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}",budget!="<remote>"}[1m])) by (project, network, user)

sum(rate(erpc_rate_limits_total{origin="upstream",budget="<remote>",project=~"${project:regex}",network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}"}[1m])) by (project, network, vendor)

sum(rate(erpc_rate_limits_total{origin="upstream",budget!="<remote>",project=~"${project:regex}",network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}"}[1m])) by (project, network, vendor)

sum(rate(erpc_rate_limits_total{origin="auth",project=~"${project:regex}",network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}"}[1m])) by (project, network, user, auth)

sum(rate(erpc_rate_limits_total{network=~"${network:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}"}[1m])) by (project, network, category, origin, budget)

sum(rate(erpc_rate_limiter_failopen_total{network=~"${network:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",category=~"${category:regex}"}[1m])) by (project, network, category, origin, budget)

histogram_quantile(0.99, sum(rate(erpc_network_evm_get_logs_range_requested_bucket{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",finality=~"${finality:regex}"}[1m])) by (le, project, network, user, finality))

histogram_quantile(0.5, sum(rate(erpc_network_evm_get_logs_range_requested_bucket{network=~"${network:regex}",upstream=~"${upstream:regex}",project=~"${project:regex}",finality=~"${finality:regex}"}[1m])) by (le, project, network, user, finality))
